solutions.solution: A belonged to the 20th century, B wrote drama only, C contributed to Marathi literature, E was a Hindi poet and novelist and belonged to the 19th century, E also belonged to the 19th century, not B contributed to 20th century. Among the Bengali language did B contribute?
Among these, who was the Tamil writer?
To which branch of literature did A contribute?
Among these, who was the Bengali writer?
To which branch of literature did C contribute?

Directions (Q. 145-149): Read the following information carefully and answer the questions that follow: (i) There is a group of five persons A, B, C D and E. (ii) One of them is a horticulturist, one is a physicist, one is a journalist, one is an industrialist and one is an advocate. (iii) Three of them, A, C and the advocate, prefer tea to coffee and two of them, B and the journalist, prefer coffee to tea. (iv) The industrialist and D and A are friends to one another but two of them prefer coffee to tea. (v) The horticulturist is C's brother. Who is a horticulturist?
Which of the following groups includes a person who likes tea but is not an advocate?
Which of the statements above is superfluous?
